name: Peanut Butter Cookies/no Sugar
recipeInstructions: Cream together margarine, peanut butter and sugar replacements. Add egg, water and vanilla, beating until fluffy. Combine flour, baking soda and baking powder in a sifter and sift dry ingredients into the creamed mixture. Stir to blend completely. Chill thoroughly, at least 2 hours or overnight. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto lightly greased cookie sheets, 2 to 3 inches apart. Press flat with a floured bottom of a small glass. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes.
